source: Kaggle T4 run; full log. Command: train_trajectory --task distance --constrained_velocity --epochs 8 --lr 1e-4 --seed 0 (6-module grid cortex, early stopping ON).
cortex: velocity-driven hexagonal grid modules (6 modules, constrained_velocity)
note: 6-module grid cortex + early stopping (restored the best-val epoch, val exact 95%) + lr 1e-4. Distance exact is now 95/88/85 (flat across length, vs the place cortex's 62/46/40) and within-1 100/99/94. The earlier wobble (74->44) was an LLM optimization artifact, fixed by early stopping; the cortex rep was always excellent (probe 100/95/93). cortex OFF ~chance => answered through the cortex.
